prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-135CKWDSAH-135-2-AMZ-HPN-2 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Tactknife Existing Title: Stainless Steel Outdoor Knife With Fixed Blade, Collectible Deer Knife with Scabbard, 7" Description: Product features:

Manufactured from premium Stainless Steel that will ensure a lasting and pleasant use.

The sharpness of the knife will surprise you.

Very comfortable in hand.

Great gift for men and women Search Terms: collectable authentic steel blade outdoorsman deer scabbard hunting dagger knife collectors ornate knives etched design with sheath Features: - Tactical Hunting knife. Size: 13.5" - Survival Combat knife. Made of high quality stainless steel. - Hunting knife. This knife will be a nice and pleasant gift. - Tactical knife. The sharpness of the knife will pleasantly surprise you. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Tactknife 13.5" Stainless Steel Fixed Blade Deer Hunting Knife

openai.item_name: Tactknife 7 in Stainless Steel Fixed Blade Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Premium Stainless Steel, Fixed Blade, Includes Scabbard, Sharp Collectible Design, Tactical Survival Knife, Great Gift

openai.title_differentiation: Includes Scabbard, Razor Sharp Edge, Comfortable Grip, Outdoor Survival Use, Great Gift For Men And Women
